surfaces.card: bg-white border-2 border-[#0F0F0F] shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_#0F0F0F] rounded-xl overflow-hidden
surfaces.card_interactive: bg-white border-2 border-[#0F0F0F] shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_#0F0F0F] rounded-xl transition-all hover:-translate-y-1 hover:-translate-x-1 hover:shadow-[6px_6px_0px_0px_#0F0F0F] cursor-pointer
surfaces.button_primary: bg-[#C4F1F9] text-[#0F0F0F] font-bold border-2 border-[#0F0F0F] shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_#0F0F0F] rounded-full px-6 py-3 transition-all hover:bg-[#A8E6F2] hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:shadow-[6px_6px_0px_0px_#0F0F0F] active:translate-y-1 active:translate-x-1 active:shadow-[0px_0px_0px_0px_#0F0F0F]
surfaces.button_secondary: bg-white text-[#0F0F0F] font-bold border-2 border-[#0F0F0F] shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_#0F0F0F] rounded-full px-6 py-3 transition-all hover:bg-gray-50 hover:-translate-y-0.5 hover:shadow-[6px_6px_0px_0px_#0F0F0F] active:translate-y-1 active:translate-x-1 active:shadow-[0px_0px_0px_0px_#0F0F0F]
surfaces.input: bg-white border-2 border-[#0F0F0F] rounded-lg px-4 py-3 focus:outline-none focus:ring-0 focus:shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_#C4F1F9] transition-all
surfaces.header: bg-[#FFFDF2] border-b-2 border-[#0F0F0F] sticky top-0 z-50
surfaces.tag_success: bg-[#BDE6A3] border-2 border-[#0F0F0F] text-[#0F0F0F] text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider px-2 py-1 rounded-md
surfaces.tag_danger: bg-[#FFC4D9] border-2 border-[#0F0F0F] text-[#0F0F0F] text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-wider px-2 py-1 rounded-md

layout.alignment: Left-align forms, lists, and tabular data. Center-align hero headings and onboarding steps.

components_strategy.forms: Use Shadcn customized heavily: remove default ring, apply 2px solid black border to inputs.
components_strategy.modals: Shadcn Dialog. Override background to solid white, 2px border, and large hard shadow.
components_strategy.tables: Shadcn Table. Remove subtle gray borders, add 2px solid border at table edges, bottom border on rows.
components_strategy.tabs: Shadcn Tabs. Use custom styling with pill-shaped tabs that toggle background color (e.g. from white to #C4F1F9) with a 2px solid border.
components_strategy.receipt_scanner: Create a visual 'paper-like' container with a zig-zag bottom edge SVG, surrounded by a hard black border. Include a scanning laser animation (framer-motion).

motion.hover: Snappy, physical. Elements should feel like physical blocks moving on a table.
motion.entrance: Staggered fade up with slight scaling (framer-motion).
motion.scanning: A glowing colored line (#C4F1F9) moving down the receipt image.

images.description: Friends laughing and enjoying a meal together, used for empty states or landing page.
A raw paper texture / text image to act as a placeholder for scanned receipts.

accessibility.contrast: Extremely high contrast due to Neo-brutalism. All text is near-black on light pastel backgrounds.
accessibility.interactive: All buttons and inputs must have hover/active state visual changes and data-testid attributes.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install @phosphor-icons/react and use weight='bold' for all icons.
Use Cabinet Grotesk for headings and Work Sans for body. Do not use Inter or Space Grotesk.
Implement the UI using Neo-Brutalism. Everything must have a 2px solid border '#0F0F0F' and a solid shadow '[4px_4px_0px_0px_#0F0F0F]'.
Do NOT use generic light gray subtle shadows. The design should feel tactile, punchy, and raw.
For the Split Calculator, ensure the math is clear and the UI highlights 'Who Owes Whom' using the success (#BDE6A3) and danger (#FFC4D9) pastel colors.
Ensure every interactive element has a data-testid attribute.
The header must NOT be transparent; use solid background (#FFFDF2) with a solid bottom border.
